Table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT

Card of table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT

Name

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT

Code

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT

 

No RLS as this table is a dictionary

Historization: SCD1

Load type: DELTA

 

VALID_FROM - 1900-01-01 00:00:00

 

select md5(ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK+VALID_FROM) ,

MD5(ATLAN_ASSET_TAG_ID_BK+VALID_FROM)

FROM

(

SELECT A.GUID AS ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK,

A.TAG_NAME AS ATLAN_ASSET_TAG_ID_BK

FROM

(

SELECT DISTINCT

GUID,

TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) AS TAG_NAME

FROM (

SELECT DISTINCT GUID, TAGS

FROM T_ATLAN_EXPORT_PHYSICAL_ASSETS

WHERE TAGS IS NOT NULL

) AS BASE,

LATERAL SPLIT_TO_TABLE(BASE.TAGS, ',') AS SPLIT

WHERE TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) != ''

ORDER BY GUID, TAG_NAME) A


Check constraint name of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT

CKT_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_AS


Server validation rule of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT

%RULES%


Code preview of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT

drop table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT
--==============================================================
create or replace table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT (
DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
DIM_ASSET_TAG_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
constraint PK_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASS primary key (DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY, DIM_ASSET_TAG_KEY)
not enforced
);

alter table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT set comment = 'Factless fact table having having TAGS associated with each physical asset';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT.DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY is
'dimensional Key adding unique identifier';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_TAG_ASSIGNMENT.DIM_ASSET_TAG_KEY is
'artificially generated unique identifier for each asset tag';
